title: SUBWAY
blurb: Canal Street platform. The trains aren't running. Don't ask why. Clear the platform, clear the tunnel mouths, then come back up.
briefing: The MTA is not running the Lexington line tonight. There's a transfer stub for a station that doesn't exist. A rosary diagram in chalk where the route map used to be. The platform is full. The tunnel mouths are fuller. The Pawnbroker says the Mac-10 fell off a truck. You don't ask which truck.
epigraph: "Someone has clawed the route map off the platform wall."

debrief.win: Lexington line is running local at six tomorrow. The token clerk at Canal will not be there. Someone else will. Don't make eye contact. Don't ask after the previous girl. The Mac-10 goes back into the floor safe.
debrief.loss: The MTA found what they found. They told the family it was electrical. The family knows it was not electrical. The family will not say so. That's the deal we have with this city.
debrief.sGrade: Whoever clawed the route map down — they know your face now. Walk a different way to the shop for a month. Take the bus. Take the long way. Trust me on this.
